---
id: get-a-list-of-dashboards
title: "Get a list of dashboards"
description: "Gets a list of dashboards, use Rison or JSON query parameters for filtering, sorting, pagination and  for selecting specific columns and metadata."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a list of dashboards"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/dashboard/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Gets a list of dashboards, use Rison or JSON query parameters for filtering, sorting, pagination and  for selecting specific columns and metadata.
